attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SOCSI.BATCH_ID                      
,SOCSI.SO_LINE_ID                    
,SOCSI.INVOICE_HOLD_FLG              
,SOCSI.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,SOCSI.DB_SOURCE_NAME                
,SOCSI.CREATION_DATE                 
,SOCSI.CREATED_BY                    
,SOCSI.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,SOCSI.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,SOCSI.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             
,SOCSI.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,SOCSI.CREATE_DATETIME               
,SOCSI.ACTION_CODE               
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCFI_SOL_INV_HOLD_AL  SOCSI
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS 
(
SELECT 1 FROM   $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCFI_SOL_INV_HOLD_AL SOHL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SOHL.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
 ON SOHL.SO_LINE_ID = SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
 AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSOL.SS_CODE
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSLHT
 ON NSLHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)

SELECT TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,TVOUTPUT.INVOICE_HOLD_FLG
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EW_CREATE_DATETIME
,USER EW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,USER EW_UPDATE_USER
,RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS START_TV_DATE
,COALESCE (MAX (CAST (RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE  AS DATE) - INTERVAL '1'  DAY)
OVER (PARTITION BY  TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
     ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC 
     ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') AS  END_TV_DATE,
TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC) RANK_INDEX,
(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX=1 AND NSOLHT_OUT.BK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM
 (
SELECT 
TVINPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
TVINPUT.INVOICE_HOLD_FLG,
TVINPUT.START_TV_DATE,
TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
TVINPUT.ACTION_CODE,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,TVINPUT.INVOICE_HOLD_FLG 
ORDER BY TVINPUT.START_TV_DATE DESC) AS ROW_NUM
FROM
(SELECT SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SOHL.INVOICE_HOLD_FLG
,CAST(SOHL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE) AS START_TV_DATE
,SOHL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCFI_SOL_INV_HOLD_AL SOHL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SOHL.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL  
	ON SOHL.SO_LINE_ID = SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
    AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSOL.SS_CODE
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSLHT 
	ON NSLHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

UNION ALL
(SELECT SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,EOHL.INVOICE_HOLD_FLG
,CAST(EOHL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE) AS START_TV_DATE
,EOHL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,'E' AS ACTION_CODE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXCFI_SOL_INV_HOLD_AL EOHL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EOHL.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL  
	ON EOHL.SO_LINE_ID = SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
    AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSOL.SS_CODE
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSLHT 
	ON NSLHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)

UNION ALL

SELECT 
/*SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY*/
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NSOL_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(NSOL_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) ELSE NSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SCXSIHA.INV_HOLD
,CAST(SCXSIHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE) AS START_TV_DATE
,SCXSIHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HOLD_AL SCXSIHA 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SCXSIHA.GLOBAL_NAME
/*INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL  
	ON SCXSIHA.SO_LINE_ID = SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
    AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSOL.SS_CODE
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSLHT 
	ON NSLHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY*/
/* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_ORIG
	ON NSOL_ORIG.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = SCXSIHA.SO_LINE_ID
	AND NSOL_ORIG.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE

/* Included as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
LEFT OUTER JOIN (
    SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ABS(SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT), SS_CODE, ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG 
    ORDER BY SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT ASC)=1) NSOLV
    ON  ABS(NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) = ABS(SCXSIHA.SO_LINE_ID)
    AND NSOLV.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    AND NSOLV.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y'	
	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
	ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = SCXSIHA.ORG_ID
	AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_CAL
	ON NSOL_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = SCXSIHA.SO_LINE_ID
	AND NSOL_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD	
WHERE (NSOL_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL OR NSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL OR NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL)	
/* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */	

UNION ALL
SELECT 
/*SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY*/
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NSOL_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(NSOL_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) ELSE NSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,ECXSIHA.INV_HOLD
,CAST(ECXSIHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE) AS START_TV_DATE
,ECXSIHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,'E' AS ACTION_CODE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HOLD_AL ECXSIHA 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = ECXSIHA.GLOBAL_NAME
/*INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL  
	ON ECXSIHA.SO_LINE_ID = SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
    AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSOL.SS_CODE
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSLHT 
	ON NSLHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)	*/
/* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_ORIG
	ON NSOL_ORIG.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = ECXSIHA.SO_LINE_ID
	AND NSOL_ORIG.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE

/* Included as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
LEFT OUTER JOIN (
    SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ABS(SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT), SS_CODE, ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG 
    ORDER BY SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT ASC)=1) NSOLV
    ON  ABS(NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) = ABS(ECXSIHA.SO_LINE_ID)
    AND NSOLV.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    AND NSOLV.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y'		
	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
	ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = ECXSIHA.ORG_ID
	AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_CAL
	ON NSOL_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = ECXSIHA.SO_LINE_ID
	AND NSOL_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD	
WHERE (NSOL_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL OR NSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL OR NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL)	
/* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */			
		
UNION ALL

SELECT NSLHTV.BK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,NSLHTV.INVOICE_HOLD_FLG 
,NSLHTV.START_TV_DT AS START_TV_DATE
,NSLHTV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,'X' AS ACTION_CODE
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SLS_ORD_LN_INVCE_HOLD_TV NSLHTV
WHERE NSLHTV.END_TV_DT = CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
AND EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCFI_SOL_INV_HOLD_AL SOLH
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL  
	ON SOLH.SO_LINE_ID = SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SLS_ORD_LN_INVCE_HOLD_TV NSLHT 
	ON NSLHT.BK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
UNION ALL
SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HOLD_AL SCXSIHA 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL  
	ON SCXSIHA.SO_LINE_ID = SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT

/* Included as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
LEFT OUTER JOIN (
    SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV  
	WHERE SS_CODE = 'CG' AND ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y'	
	QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ABS(SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT), SS_CODE, ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG 
    ORDER BY SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT ASC)=1) NSOLV
    ON  ABS(NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) = ABS(SCXSIHA.SO_LINE_ID)	
	
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SLS_ORD_LN_INVCE_HOLD_TV NSLHT 
	ON NSLHT.BK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = COALESCE(SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)	
	)
OR EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXCFI_SOL_INV_HOLD_AL SOLH
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL  
	ON SOLH.SO_LINE_ID = SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SLS_ORD_LN_INVCE_HOLD_TV NSLHT 
	ON NSLHT.BK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
UNION ALL
SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HOLD_AL ECXSIHA 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL  
	ON ECXSIHA.SO_LINE_ID = SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT

/* Included as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
LEFT OUTER JOIN (
    SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV  
	WHERE SS_CODE = 'CG' AND ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y'	
	QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ABS(SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT), SS_CODE, ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG 
    ORDER BY SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT ASC)=1) NSOLV
    ON  ABS(NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) = ABS(ECXSIHA.SO_LINE_ID)	
	
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SLS_ORD_LN_INVCE_HOLD_TV NSLHT 
	ON NSLHT.BK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = COALESCE(SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)	
	)	
)TVINPUT
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,TVINPUT.START_TV_DATE ORDER BY TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME DESC) =1
)TVOUTPUT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SLS_ORD_LN_INVCE_HOLD_TV NSOLHT_OUT
ON NSOLHT_OUT.BK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NSOLHT_OUT.END_TV_DT = CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
ON TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE BETWEEN FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1

SELECT
SOCSI.BATCH_ID                      
,SOCSI.SO_LINE_ID                    
,SOCSI.INV_HOLD              
,SOCSI.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,SOCSI.DB_SOURCE_NAME                
,SOCSI.CREATION_DATE                 
,SOCSI.CREATED_BY                    
,SOCSI.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,SOCSI.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,SOCSI.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN 
,SOCSI.CREATE_DATETIME               
,SOCSI.ACTION_CODE
,SOCSI.ORG_ID               
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HOLD_AL  SOCSI
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS 
(
SELECT 1 FROM   $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HOLD_AL SOHL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SOHL.GLOBAL_NAME
/*INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
 ON SOHL.SO_LINE_ID = SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
 AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSOL.SS_CODE
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSLHT
 ON NSLHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)*/
/* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_ORIG
	ON NSOL_ORIG.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = SOHL.SO_LINE_ID
	AND NSOL_ORIG.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	
/* Included as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN (
    SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ABS(SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT), SS_CODE, ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG 
    ORDER BY SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT ASC)=1) NSOLV
    ON  ABS(NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) = ABS(SOHL.SO_LINE_ID)
    AND NSOLV.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    AND NSOLV.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y'
 	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
	ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = SOHL.ORG_ID
	AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_CAL
	ON NSOL_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = SOHL.SO_LINE_ID
	AND NSOL_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD	
WHERE 
		NSOL_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  IS NOT NULL OR NSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL OR NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL
	/* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */ 
)
